title: Gas Station
input_format: Two integer arrays `gas` and `cost` where `gas[i]` is the amount of gas at the `ith` station and `cost[i]` is the cost of gas to go from the `ith` station to the next (`i+1`) station.
output_format: The starting gas station's index if you can travel around the circuit once in the clockwise direction, otherwise return `-1`.
function_signature: function canCompleteCircuit(gas: number[], cost: number[]): number {}
